JUDGE DONNA HITCHENS, CLERK NICOLE ADAMS, REPORTER PATTY VAN STEENBERGE. MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2003 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-18-2003 AT 9:15 AM IN DEPT. 505, JOHN E. MUNTER.
MINUTES FOR AUG-18-2003 9:15 AM FOR DEPT 505

ASSIGNED FOR JURY TRIAL. SETTLED AND THE TERMS ARE PUT ON THE RECORD: PLTF SHALL HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFT THE PERMANENT RESITITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES AT 5537 DIAMOND HEIGHTS BLVD., SF., CA. A WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR RESTITUTION OF POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES SHALL BE STAYED UNTIL 5PM ON MARCH 31, 2004. PLTF MAY ENFORCE AND EXECUTE ON WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR RESTITUTION OF POSSESSION THROUGH THE SF SHERIFF'S DEPT., IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATED THE PREMISES. THE "TENANCY AT WILL" IS TERMINATED AND FORFEITED. IF DEFT FAILS TO SURRENDER THE PREMISSES, PLTF MAY COME TO THIS COURT, EX-PARTE, WITH 24-HOUR NOTICE TO DEFT, AND WITH DECLARATION, FILE STIPULATION AND JUDGMENT WILL BE ENTERED IN FAVOR OF PLTF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES. THE WRIT OF EXECUTION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY AND THE SHERIFF SHALL EVIT DEFT. JUDGE, JOHN E. MUNTER;REPORTER, RHONDA AQUILINA;CLERK, T.MARUYAMA (DEPT. 505)
